category_sources: source_facts.description: Secure communications between a client and a DNS resolver.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives dnscrypt-proxy; source_facts.homepage is the official DNSCrypt site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official DNSCrypt site; official GitHub wiki/README provide project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/DNSCrypt/dnscrypt-proxy; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies secure DNS resolver communications; source_facts.executables lists dnscrypt-proxy.
